character.description: broad iron gatekeeper with rectangular tower shield and compact holstered mace, facing left

chroma_key.name: green
chroma_key.selection_reason: highest 1st-percentile subject distance among the 3 candidate(s) clearing the 96 erase radius

idle.action: subtle armored breathing and weight shift; keep both feet planted, tower shield braced forward, and mace holstered; final frame returns close to the first

attack.action: readable shield bash: compact brace, short armored step driving the tower shield forward, recoil, recovery into the blocking idle stance; mace stays holstered and effects stay attached

hurt.action: brief heavy impact recoil: shield knocked slightly aside, armored stagger, regain footing, restore the blocking idle stance; no counterattack and no detached effects

style: match the accepted idle anchor exactly: bright crisp 16-bit-inspired pixel art, 32px-grid aesthetic, chunky SD proportions, identical outline weight, palette, dark iron plate, brass rivets, closed helmet, large rectangular tower shield, and compact holstered mace
